finding.summary: Track level is low (integrated LUFS -20) and has a bass-heavy tonal balance with limited high-frequency content.
finding.probable_cause: The synth patch likely has a low default output level and a frequency profile that emphasizes low frequencies over mids and highs.
finding.confidence_reason: Integrated LUFS and RMS levels are about 4 dB below typical mix targets; spectrum shows a steep drop from 100 Hz to 4 kHz, but only three bins are available, giving limited spectral resolution.

evidence_refs.description: Integrated loudness -20 LUFS is well below common mix levels (-14 to -16 LUFS).
100 Hz at -18 dB, 1 kHz at -24 dB, 4 kHz at -30 dB; implies strong low-end relative to mids and highs.

proposal.reason: Raising track volume by 4 dB will bring integrated LUFS closer to -16 (a typical mix target) while keeping true peak below 0 dBFS (-1.5 dB).
